description: Style NoteThese numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek sneaker. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt.Product Details Round toe, black shoe with lace up styling  and off-white overlaysSynthetic upper with reinforced overlay at the heel collar and perforations at the toe boxPadded collar and tongue Rubber midsole TPU outsole with herringbone and horizontal groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush Do not store in direct sunlight
